approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies recognised assets or liabilities as eligible hedged items, which makes the hedge of foreign-exchange risk on a recognised dividend receivable a relevant top-level hedge model.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies highly probable forecast transactions as hedged items, including certain intragroup foreign-currency transactions in consolidated financial statements, making this a relevant peer hedge model.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 recognise net investment hedging as a distinct hedge-accounting model for foreign-exchange risk in consolidated financial statements.
